## Cursor instruction

First create or update:

`docs/architecture-v2/326_ARCHITECTURE_GAP_ANALYSIS.md`

The gap analysis must compare:

- Architecture v2 specifications
- current repository implementation
- existing Universal Work Engine
- current Blueprint framework
- current Chamber runtime
- current Project bridge
- current output generation
- current recovery patterns
- current registries
- current tests

Then create:

- `docs/architecture-v2/332_RUNTIME_COMPOSITION_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`
- `docs/architecture-v2/333_WORK_PROJECT_BRIDGE_AUDIT.md`
- `docs/architecture-v2/334_RESILIENCE_AND_RECOVERY_AUDIT.md`

Do not create a parallel runtime.

Recommend the smallest safe implementation slice.

Preferred first slice:

- one certified capability execution contract
- one cross-member Collection
- one canonical Work item
- one approved output
- one intentional Project handoff
- one failure-recovery test
